canonical_answer: A blonde woman wearing a black top stands behind a white table covered with a cloth. Two large cupcake cutouts, one pink and one white, flank the scene on either side. A tiered stand holds small cakes topped with strawberries, while a metal wire stand displays cupcake-shaped lollipops with blue frosting. A festive centerpiece with greenery and red berries sits on the front left of the table.

question: Describe what is happening in the scene.
canonical_answer: Small square cakes topped with red strawberries rest on a white two-tiered stand in the center. A metal wire tree holds numerous cake pops decorated with blue and white icing to the right. Red and white striped wrappers with holiday text surround some cupcakes. Green pine branches with silver ornaments and red berries form an arrangement on the table surface.

question: Describe the sequence of scenes and key objects displayed throughout the video timeline.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a woman stands behind a table with large cupcake cutouts; at 4s, she gestures near a metal stand holding cake pops; at 16s, a close-up shows cupcakes with strawberry Santa hats; at 18s, the view returns to the woman behind the table display.

question: Narrate the specific details visible on the dessert stands during each scene change.
canonical_answer: At 2s, tiered stands hold small cakes topped with strawberries; at 16s, text reading 'Happy Holiday's' appears on cupcake wrappers; at 18s, a wire stand displays items with 'MAX' toppers; at 20s, the woman remains behind the white tablecloth covered table.
